title: 2026-06-14 to 2026-06-18 Shino Ise Weather Lab
summary: Eleven-image Shino character day sequence covering Sunday through Thursday, moving through harbor market, tram detour, aquarium, lab work, library, old-town bar, home, and station errands without real logos.
summaryJa: 架空の港町のアルバム。構成はマーケット、街歩き、ミュージアム、仕事場。

images.alt: Shino at a humid after-rain harbor morning market on Sunday 2026-06-14 wearing a mint linen shirt dress, lemon-yellow scarf, brown sandals, pale blue pendant, and old-key charm while buying citrus and coffee
images.title: 01 0614 Market after rain mint lemon
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Fictional Port City / market / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino near a harbor monument square after taking the wrong tram stop on Sunday 2026-06-14 wearing a coral sleeveless knit, navy wide-leg trousers, white open shirt, jellyfish earrings, and low mules
images.title: 02 0614 Wrong tram monument coral navy
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Fictional Port City / travel / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino watching a plain deep-sea fish in a short aquarium tunnel on Sunday 2026-06-14 wearing a teal wrap dress, ivory cropped cardigan, glass jellyfish pendant, and flat sandals
images.title: 03 0614 Aquarium tunnel teal wrap
images.tags: Soft Anime / Fictional Port City / gallery / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino commuting to a fictional harbor-side standards lab on Monday 2026-06-15 wearing a terracotta cardigan, white sleeveless blouse, graphite tapered trousers, loafers, ID card, and tote with fish charm

images.tags: Anime Editorial / Fictional Port City / office / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino checking a compact appliance sample in a fictional environmental temperature-humidity lab on Monday 2026-06-15 wearing a pale gray lab coat, cobalt sleeveless knit, cropped trousers, safety glasses, ESD wrist strap, and fish pin

images.tags: Anime Editorial / Fictional Port City / weekend / Shino 25

images.title: 09 0617 Old town bar burgundy seagreen
